research_axes.finding: MCST annual regional festival page is strongest for 2017-2026; 2016 needs narrower report plus local backfill.
Korea Tourism Data Lab provides visitor, daily-average visitor, spending, demographics, SNS mention and keyword trend signals; trend-oriented metrics must not be treated as exact totals.
Local Finance 365 cost accounting, budget allocation and contract status are core sources for cost, revenue, net cost, contract method, vendor and amount.
Nara/G2B APIs and attachments can expose bid notices, RFP/task instructions, changes, cancellations and contract chains.
Cases cluster around crowding/access, pricing, safety/weather, budget efficiency, content differentiation and governance/evaluation.
Use narrative summary first, evidence workspace second, and source/provenance drawers last; every claim should click through to evidence.

guardrails: no hidden subcontract claims without public evidence
no exact-total interpretation for trend-oriented big-data metrics

confidence_grades.C: news/public reviews/blogs/SNS-style public signals with cross-checking
confidence_grades.D: weak public trace or missing data

matching_rules.high: same festival alias plus bid or contract identifier, same agency/date/contract chain
matching_rules.medium: slightly different title but venue, organizer, period and attachment text align
matching_rules.low: keyword overlap only or isolated plan/notice without award/contract tail
matching_rules.reject: incompatible organizer, geography, date, or attachment year
